calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Plaintiff pro per, Carlos A. Funes and Spanish Court Interpreter, Daniel Navarro (certification #300802). Sanctions against Carlos A. Funes for failure to appear at the Order to Show Cause hearings on Mar-10-2015 and Jun-09-2015 are vacated. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2015 Continued To Sep-29-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Self-represented Plaintiff Carlos Funes with Court Spanish Interpreter, Shannon Raintree (cerification # 300563). The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Sep-29-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2015 Continued To Aug-11-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance by Plaintiff Pro Per. Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Aug-11-2015 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk J Lee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
